categories.title: Categories
categories.selectBranch: Select a branch to view its categories

categories.formHelpIntro: Fill in the following fields to create or edit a category:
categories.formHelpName: Descriptive name for the category (e.g.: Food, Drinks, Desserts). Required.
categories.formHelpIcon: An emoji or icon code to visually represent the category (e.g.: 🍔, 🍺).
categories.formHelpImage: Upload a representative image for the category. It will be shown in the menu.
categories.formHelpOrder: Number that defines the category position in the menu. Lower number = appears first.
categories.formHelpActive: Enable or disable category visibility in the public menu.
categories.formHelpTip: Inactive categories won't be shown in the public menu but will remain in the system with all their products.

productExclusions.title: Product Exclusions
productExclusions.description: Configure which categories or subcategories are NOT sold at each branch
productExclusions.adminOnlyMessage: Only users with ADMIN role can manage product exclusions.
productExclusions.branchesSelected: {{count}} branch(es) selected. Use the toggle in the table to exclude categories/subcategories from these branches.
productExclusions.nowSoldAt: "{{name}}" is now sold at selected branches
productExclusions.step1: Select one or more branches in the section above.
productExclusions.step2: Toggle the "Exclude" column to mark a category/subcategory as NOT available at selected branches.
productExclusions.step3: Excluded categories will not appear in the menu for those branches.
productExclusions.noteExclude: Excluding a category automatically excludes all its subcategories and products for that branch.
